title: update_book/delete_book panic on DB error instead of returning 500
evidence: src/main.rs:254 and src/main.rs:293 call db.find_by_id(id).unwrap() — a rusqlite error unwinds the worker thread rather than returning HttpResponse::InternalServerError
suggestion: Match on the Result and return a 500 JSON error, as the other handlers already do

title: Single global Mutex serializes all database access
evidence: src/main.rs:42 conn: Arc<Mutex<Connection>>; every handler locks the one connection, so requests cannot run DB work concurrently
suggestion: Use a connection pool (e.g. r2d2/deadpool) for concurrent request handling

title: Tests exercise the Db layer only, not HTTP handlers/routing/validation
evidence: src/main.rs:312-448 all 10 tests call Db methods directly; no test drives create_book/list_books via actix test utilities, so R8 status codes and R9 validation are unverified end-to-end
suggestion: Add actix_web::test integration tests covering 201/400/404 responses and the title/author validation path
